company.name: PT. Accelist Lentera Indonesia
company.description: Accelist is Indonesia’s IT consulting company that specializes in custom software development, system integration, and digital transformation across multiple industries.

responsibilities: Delivered fullstack features across web & mobile systems using C# ASP.NET, React.js/Next.js, and React Native, which support multiple enterprise-grade systems.
Resolved critical bugs across internal and external projects that improved system reliability, reduced reporting inconsistencies, and reduced edge-case errors.
Developed scalable frontend components and API integrations, enhancing UX for several systems such as inbox systems, leave management systems, project monitoring systems, etc.

Collaborated in an SDLC (Scrum) team (developers, BA, PM) to deliver iterative releases, contributing to successful sprint deliveries and UAT readiness through active requirement analysis, debugging, and refactoring.

project-a1.name: Project A1
project-a1.description: Module for tracking daily employee tasks to support effective manpower distribution
contributions: Fixed a bug in tab switching (Today Task & Yesterday Task)
Implemented a confirmation pop-up when there are unsaved data changes
Improved task submission logic and data validation
Fixed submit button issues (disabled, spam clicks, and inconsistent states)
Adjusted the pop-up UI to match Figma design
Handled edge cases such as empty data and canceled changes

project-a2.name: Project A2
project-a2.description: Approval module for vouchers and purchase orders integrated from web to mobile systems
contributions: Implementation of approval features (Approve, Decline, Need Revision)
Development of list and detail pages for Voucher Requests
Development of list and detail pages for Purchase Order Requests
Implementation of the select multiple action feature
Addition of notes feature for Need Revisions
UI/UX improvements such as fixed buttons and notification text adjustments

project-a3.name: Project A3
project-a3.description: Module for tracking project, pipeline, and revenue data, including master data management
contributions: Bug fixes in master data (customer & manager)
Fix data storage issues (fields not saved, save not working)
Fix field validation and dependency improvements between fields
Implement autofill in the create revenue feature
Fix pipeline status not updating
Business logic adjustments in the revenue and pipeline features

project-a4.name: Project A4
project-a4.description: Notification module for Human Capital users, including reminders and broadcast messages
contributions: Development of Reminder and Notification (Inbox) features
Implementation of read/unread status feature
Addition of search and filter features to notifications
Development of broadcast message feature
Addition of notification icon (bell) on landing page
Fixed bugs related to loading, freezing, and navigation

project-b.name: Project B
project-b.description: Mobile application for managing student and mentor data, including statistics, news, profiles, and user relationships
contributions: Bug fixes in the UI and input fields (email, name, etc.)
Validation implementation in input forms
Data binding improvements in user profiles
Layout and spacing adjustments according to design
Addition of confirmation pop-ups when data changes have not been saved

project-c.name: Project C
project-c.description: Website to display employee work histories that can be used internally and externally by the company
contributions: Home page development (Hero, Features, Clients)
Creation of reusable components and section layouts
Reply Message feature development (editor, attachment, toolbar)
Employee Detail Screen development
Frontend and backend API integration (partially canceled)
Admin Inbox page UI development
API integration for reply & approval features
UI design adjustments based on admin needs

project-e.name: Project E
project-e.description: Website for job vacancy management and recruitment process
contributions: Bug fixes in the CMS vacancy feature
Migrating encryption methods from symmetric (AES) to asymmetric (RSA)
Improving the login encryption process
Email service integration using SendGrid for production
Debugging production issues related to encryption and email

project-f.name: Project F
project-f.description: Mobile application for event registration, participant monitoring, and QR scanning attendance
contributions: Bug fixes in the pop-up navigation feature
UX improvements in filter, sort, and ticket selection
Debugging user interaction issues in the pop-up menu

project-g.name: Project G
project-g.description: Community platform for creating, joining, and managing events
contributions: Bug fixes in the dashboard and role management
Development of the Latest Info (CRUD) feature
Improvements to the chat and notification features
Implementation of automatic chat room creation logic
UI/UX improvements on mobile (chat, header, event links)

project-h.name: Project H
project-h.focus: Monitoring or tracking the progress of a project being worked on
project-h.description: System for monitoring project progress from the requirements stage to development
contributions: Dashboard UI and User Management Development
API Development for dashboard and PICA management
Frontend and backend integration
CRUD user management feature implementation
UI improvements and adjustments according to Figma
Bug fixing in Role Management & PICA Management features
Code refactoring to improve maintainability
Role access checking (CRUD) implementation based on user privileges

project-i.name: Project I
project-i.description: A system for managing Dealer Finance reports used to process ceiling data and dealer collection reports
contributions: Report development (Waiting Outstanding, Outstanding Loan, Dealer Payment, Payment Report)
Implementation of filter features, data grids, and report export to Excel
Invoice data processing based on statuses such as Waiting Outstanding, Outstanding Loan, and Payment
Addition of report upload and download features
Development of the User to Dealer Mapping feature to manage data visibility based on user
Implementation of automatic logic for dealer mapping based on username if there is no manual mapping

project-a5.name: Project A5
project-a5.focus: Managing employee leave applications, usage, and recording

contributions: Development of the Leave Quota Mutation page
Backgrounder for auto-approving leave

project-j.name: Project J

project-a.name: Project A
